name: Valora Survival
short_description: Valora Survival is a multiplayer 3D survival game where the possibilities are endless, you can build a farm, a town, even an entire civilization with your friends! There are wild animals, and you are to weak to fight them with your arms so you have to find a way to craft weapons and tools.
detailed_description:
Valora Survival is a free-to-play multiplayer 3D survival game where the possibilities are endless, you can build a farm, a town, even an entire civilization with your friends!
There are wild animals, and you are to weak to fight them with your arms so you have to find a way to craft weapons and tools.

You also have the possibility of researching and making new discoverings! Your world is expanding quickly so the only thing remaining thing for you is exploring!

Invite your friends over to you world and start creating civilizations.

The world you once knew got corrupted....[
about_the_game:
Valora Survival is a free-to-play multiplayer 3D survival game where the possibilities are endless, you can build a farm, a town, even an entire civilization with your friends!
There are wild animals, and you are to weak to fight them with your arms so you have to find a way to craft weapons and tools.

You also have the possibility of researching and making new discoverings! Your world is expanding quickly so the only thing remaining thing for you is exploring!

Invite your friends over to you world and start creating civilizations.
